widgets_values: Create a 1-2 sentence description of the character. Start by establishing what the character is and focus on a physical description and outfit
NOTE: Enable GPT prompt enhance as desired
Here, generate or load in an existing scene image
NOTE: Here select which image variant to generate video frames from
NOTE: Here select direction to pan

nodes.title: PROMPT
widgets_values: a vast green field with tall grass and trees. The sky is blue with white clouds scattered across it. The trees are of different sizes and shapes, with some taller and some shorter. The grass is a vibrant green color and appears to be healthy and well-maintained. On the left side of the image, there is a large tree with green leaves, and on the right side, there are more trees with more green leaves.
NOTE: You can upscale in batch here or select specific frames from video gen
Optional color match with the init image if color changes in video pass
do not add any extra subjects to video.
NOTE: Throughout this whole process we maintain 1280 x 720 (16:9) aspect. Adjust as desired
NOTE: For highest consistency, do the image to video -> relight -> refine, though this takes longest
